concept.description: Express Bounded Context dependencies as graph
concept.cypher: MATCH (boundedContext1:JMolecules:DDD:BoundedContext), (boundedContext2:JMolecules:DDD:BoundedContext), (boundedContext1)-[d:DEPENDS_ON]->(boundedContext2) WITH boundedContext1, boundedContext2, d as Weight RETURN boundedContext1 AS Source, Weight, boundedContext2 AS Target

concept.description: Propagates the allowed Bounded Context dependencies
concept.cypher: WITH [ {upstream: 'Core', downstream: 'Organization'}, {upstream: 'Core', downstream: 'User'}, {upstream: 'Core', downstream: 'Accounting'}, {upstream: 'Core', downstream: 'Notification'}, {upstream: 'User', downstream: 'Organization'}, {upstream: 'User', downstream: 'Accounting'}, {upstream: 'User', downstream: 'Notification'}, {upstream: 'Organization', downstream: 'Accounting'} ] as allowedDependencies UNWIND allowedDependencies as allowedDependency MATCH (upstreamBC:JMolecules:DDD {name: allowedDependency.upstream}) MATCH (downstreamBC:JMolecules:DDD {name: allowedDependency.downstream}) MERGE (downstreamBC)-[:DEFINES_DEPENDENCY]->(upstreamBC) RETURN downstreamBC.name AS downstream, upstreamBC.name AS upstream
